base.intro: This is where you set the foundation for your matching report.
base.title: Base questions
base.subtitle: Self profile
base.createError: Something went wrong while creating the questionnaire.
base.missingChoices: Answer options could not be loaded. Please reload.

intro.line2: It helps you clarify what really matters under pressure and where you draw clear boundaries.
intro.line3: You can answer it now or add it later.

values.title: Values questions
values.subtitle: Values deep dive

requiresBase.title: Complete the foundation questions first
requiresBase.description: The values add-on becomes available once your foundation questionnaire has been submitted.

values.createError: Something went wrong while creating the values questionnaire.
values.questionsLoadError: Something went wrong while loading the values add-on: {error}
values.schemaMismatch: The active values question set does not match the versioned values definition in the repository.
values.choicesLoadError: Answer options could not be loaded. Please reload.

questionnaire.forcedChoicePrompt: Which statement feels closer to you?
questionnaire.saveAnswerError: Something went wrong while saving your answer.
questionnaire.submitError: The questionnaire could not be completed.
questionnaire.unknownType: Unknown question type "{type}". The answer options are shown as a standard list.
questionnaire.missingChoices: Answer options could not be loaded. Please reload.

forcedChoice.tooFewOptions: Fewer than 5 answer levels were loaded for this forced-choice question. It is shown as a simple selection list.

baseComplete.title: Nice. Your base profile is ready.
baseComplete.description: Your answers have been saved and now form the foundation for your founder profile. You can continue right away or review your individual report first.

supportingText.valuesCompleted: Your values profile is already available. That makes your profile especially useful right now.
supportingText.valuesMissing: The values profile is the next optional layer. It shows which inner priorities shape your decisions as a founder.

highlight.valuesCompleted: The key pieces are in place: your base profile and values profile are both available.
highlight.valuesMissing: If you continue now, you can complete the values profile in a few minutes.

valuesComplete.title: Great. Your values profile is complete.
valuesComplete.description: The second profile layer is now complete too. Your report can show not only how you work as a founder, but also which guardrails and priorities shape your decisions.
valuesComplete.supportingText: In later matching, conversations and the workbook, this is often where the most useful differences become visible.
valuesComplete.highlight: Your base profile and values profile now work together.
